untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of real rates of return (nominal yield minus inflation) between two currency pairs and forward bias assessment. These macroeconomic variables (real yields, inflation differentials, forward bias) are not available in the allowed indicator set, which contains only technical indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages, etc.). The signal fundamentally requires cross-asset yield and inflation data that cannot be expressed using the provided technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a carry trade / interest rate differential strategy that requires external macroeconomic data inputs (real interest rates, inflation, forward pricing) rather than technical indicators. The entry conditions mention 'higher real rate of return' and 'forward bias phenomenon' which are derivatives of macroeconomic variables unavailable in the technical indicator library. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as per original signal specification.
